name: Reporting Your Accident Without the Usual Headaches

step.name: Step 1
step.text: Reporting an accident correctly is half the battle. Write down exactly what happened, list every single body part that hurts, and keep a copy of the report for yourself. Don't let your boss talk you into 'handling it under the table' without a formal record. If they refuse to file the claim, it's time to bring in a pro. We'll make sure the insurance company listens.

description: Reporting Your Accident Without the Usual Headaches - Murray
